description: Shared AI memory platform — gives every LLM (Claude CLI, aicli CLI, Cursor, web UI) identical project memory, billing, multi-LLM workflows, and a unified knowledge graph across all tools.

tech_stack.frontend: Vanilla JS (no framework, no bundler) + Electron shell + Vite dev server
tech_stack.ui_components: xterm.js (embedded terminal) + Monaco editor + Cytoscape.js (graph flows) + cytoscape-dagre
tech_stack.storage_primary: JSONL (history.jsonl with rotation to history_YYMMDDHHSS.jsonl, commit_log.jsonl), JSON, CSV
tech_stack.db_schema: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p} (phase/feature/session_id indexed), embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values (parent_id FK for unlimited nesting, due_date tracking), agent_roles, system_roles
tech_stack.authentication: JWT (python-jose) + bcrypt + DEV_MODE toggle; 3 roles: admin/paid/free
tech_stack.llm_providers: Claude (Haiku for synthesis), OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok (independent adapters)
tech_stack.workflow_engine: Node-based async DAG executor (asyncio.gather for parallel nodes) + YAML config
tech_stack.memory_synthesis: Claude Haiku for LLM-synthesized /memory; incremental since last_memory_run; dual-layer (raw JSONL → interaction_tags → 5 output files)
tech_stack.chunking: Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function (Python/JS/TS) + per-section (MD) + per-file (diff)
tech_stack.mcp: Standalone stdio MCP server with 12+ tools
tech_stack.deployment: Railway (Dockerfile + railway.toml); local: bash ui/start.sh; desktop: Electron-builder
tech_stack.database_schema: Per-project: commits_{p}, events_{p} (phase/feature/session_id indexed), embeddings_{p}, event_tags_{p}, event_links_{p}, memory_items_{p}, project_facts_{p}; shared: users, usage_logs, transactions, session_tags, entity_categories, entity_values (parent_id FK nesting), agent_roles, system_roles
tech_stack.config_management: config.py with externalized backend_url, haiku_model, db_pool_max, MCP settings

key_decisions: Engine/workspace separation: aicli/ = code only, workspace/ = per-project content, _system/ = project state
Flat file primary (JSONL with rotation on /memory); PostgreSQL 15+ with pgvector for semantic search; per-project DB tables with indexed columns (phase/feature/session_id)
Electron UI with xterm.js + Monaco editor; Vanilla JS frontend (no framework, no bundler); Vite dev server for local dev
JWT auth via python-jose + bcrypt; DEV_MODE toggle; 3 roles: admin/paid/free; login as first-level hierarchy
All LLM providers as independent adapters (Claude, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok); server holds API keys; client sends NO keys
Nested tags via parent_id FK: unlimited depth with tree UI; tags synced across Chat/History/Commits on save
History rotation on /memory: configurable max_rows (default 500), creates timestamped archive (history_YYMMDDHHSS.jsonl)
Dual-layer memory synthesis: raw JSONL → interaction_tags → 5 output files (CLAUDE.md, MEMORY.md, IDE rules, copilot rules, aicli rules)
Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function (Python/JS/TS) + per-section (MD) + per-file (diff)
Load-once-on-access pattern: eliminate redundant SQL; tag cache synced on explicit save
MCP server (stdio): 12+ tools for project state, memory search, entity management, feature status tracking
Multi-agent workflows: async DAG executor via asyncio.gather with loop-back + max_iterations cap; Cytoscape.js visualization
Composable system roles (e.g., 'coding' with clean code/comments/OOP); input/output types configurable (prompts, MD files, JSON, GitHub code)
Stateful vs stateless reviewer roles: stateful accumulates history; stateless operates on fresh context per request
Port binding safety: freePort() kills stale uvicorn; Electron cleanup via process.exit()
implemented_features: 5-layer memory architecture with /memory endpoint + LLM synthesis via Haiku
Unified history.jsonl across all LLM tools (ui, claude_cli, workflow, cursor)
Per-LLM memory files: _system/claude/CLAUDE.md, MEMORY.md, cursor/rules.md, aicli/context.md
Multi-LLM REPL: Claude, OpenAI, DeepSeek, Gemini, Grok with streaming + retry
YAML workflow executor: file injection, retry, cost tracking, inject_previous_output
Graph workflow engine: async DAG with Cytoscape.js UI, parallel nodes, loop-back edges
FastAPI backend: auth, chat SSE streaming, projects, admin, billing, git, history, workflows, entities, search
Electron UI: collapsible sidebar, 8 tabs (Chat, Summary, Prompts, Code, Flows, Projects, History, Admin)
JWT auth: admin/paid/free roles; DEV_MODE; first-user=admin; REQUIRE_AUTH toggle
Admin panel: 6 tabs (Users, Pricing, Coupons, API Keys, Usage, Billing/Costs)
Multi-user billing: balance, markup, coupons, transaction log, provider balances
Entity/relationship model: categories, values, events, event_tags, event_links (per-project tables)
Session tags + commit tagging (phase/feature/bug_ref); bulk session-tag endpoint
Projects tab: Features/Tasks/Bugs with status toggle, archive, inline create, event_count
History tab: unified sessions + Commits tab (tag inline) + Tags (⬡) tab with 3-column layout
Smart chunking: summary + per-class/function/section/file-diff with metadata filters
Semantic search: pgvector cosine similarity with language/doc_type/file_path/chunk_type filters
MCP server: 8 tools registered in .mcp.json + .cursor/mcp.json
Per-project DB schema: project_table() + ensure_project_schema(); migration endpoint
Claude CLI hooks: auto-commit-push, log_session_stop (reads .jsonl, updates history)
Git auto-deploy: commit-push from UI, auto-pull, LLM-generated commit messages
4-step project wizard: Basics → Git → IDE Support → Review
UI installer: install.sh (one-time setup) + update.sh (git pull) + start.sh
config.py reads ~/.aicli/config.json for WORKSPACE_DIR at startup
in_progress: Graph workflow UI import fix (2026-03-19) — Corrected main.js to import renderGraphWorkflow from graph_workflow.js instead of stale workflow.js; fixed case statement to call correct renderer
Role extensibility and input/output type definition (2026-03-19) — Design configurable input types (prompts, MD files, JSON) and output targets; support stateful vs stateless reviewer roles
Documents tab feature (2026-03-19) — Add 'Documents' tab after Code, mapped to per-project document folder; auto-create for all new projects; support multiple roles uploading docs
Project visibility in main view (2026-03-19) — Projects load in Recent but not selectable/visible as active project in main panel; suspected race condition during backend init
UI action buttons and Prompt Files visibility (2026-03-19) — Plus button (+) non-functional; system prompts not displaying; requires UI refactor
Memory items and project_facts table population (unresolved) — Tables exist but update logic not implemented; blocks improved memory/context mechanism

project_management_page: Project dashboard card: active features (count + top 3), open tasks, recent commits (last 3), workflow runs (last run status + duration)
Activity timeline view: unified event stream (prompts + commits + workflow runs) per project, filterable by type and date
Quick actions panel: + New Feature, + New Task, + New Bug, Run Workflow, Open in Claude CLI
Feature detail panel: click feature → see linked events, commits, workflow runs, related bugs
Kanban-style task board: columns = backlog / in-progress / review / done, drag to move status
Bulk operations: select multiple tasks/features, bulk-tag with phase or entity value
workflow_improvements: Step-by-step run log: per-node timing, token count, cost, output preview in collapsible rows
Re-run from node: click any completed node and re-run from that point with edited prompt
Workflow templates: library of pre-built workflows (feature_cycle, code_review, bug_fix, doc_update) stored in workspace/_templates/workflows/
Feature-linked workflows: when running a workflow, select which feature/task it belongs to; auto-tag all emitted events
Workflow result → task: workflow output can create/update a task entity; closes the loop between AI work and project tracking

deployment.update: bash ui/update.sh (git pull + reinstall deps, never touches workspace/)
deployment.desktop: Electron-builder: Mac dmg (arm64+x64), Windows nsis, Linux AppImage+deb

_synthesis_cache.project_summary: aicli is a shared AI memory platform combining a Python CLI, FastAPI backend, and Electron/Vanilla JS frontend to enable AI-assisted development workflows across multiple LLM providers. Currently at v2.2.0 with core features (auth, shared memory, tagging, embeddings, MCP integration) implemented but facing UI integration bugs (graph workflow renderer, project visibility) and pending feature completion (Documents tab, role extensibility, memory population logic).
_synthesis_cache.memory_digest: **[2026-03-19]** `claude_cli` — Fixed graph workflow UI import bug: main.js was importing renderWorkflow from stale workflow.js instead of renderGraphWorkflow from graph_workflow.js; corrected import statement and case handler. **[2026-03-19]** `structured_state` — Identified three parallel work streams: (1) role extensibility with configurable input/output types and stateful/stateless reviewer modes, (2) Documents tab feature with per-project folder and multi-role support, (3) project visibility bug where Recent projects don't display as active in main panel. **[2026-03-18]** `memory_summary` — Fixed AttributeError by removing stale db.ensure_project_schema() call; fixed memory endpoint CLAUDE.md template with proper code_dir variable scoping at line 1120; improved backend startup race condition handling for empty project list on first load. **[2026-03-18]** `design_decision` — Confirmed hierarchical data model (clients contain multiple users); identified that memory_items and project_facts tables exist but lack update logic, blocking improved memory/context mechanism. **[2026-03-10]** `session_summary` — Eliminated redundant SQL calls via load-once-on-access pattern with explicit save syncing; approved nested tags feature beyond 2-level hierarchy; identified data persistence bug where tags disappear on session switch; noted port binding conflicts and need for improved /memory suggestion visibility.
